currentProjects.title: Adaptive Cryptographic Intrusion Detection System for SDN-IoT Networks
currentProjects.description: Developing an intelligent intrusion detection system that leverages adaptive cryptographic techniques and deep learning to secure Software-Defined Networking enabled IoT infrastructures against evolving cyber threats.

currentProjects.title: Blockchain-Enabled Cybercrime Reporting System
currentProjects.description: Designing a decentralized, tamper-proof cybercrime reporting platform using blockchain technology to ensure transparency, privacy protection, and immutable evidence recording for law enforcement agencies.

currentProjects.title: Privacy Protection Framework for Multimodal Large Language Models
currentProjects.description: Investigating privacy vulnerabilities in multimodal LLMs and developing a comprehensive framework incorporating differential privacy, federated learning, and secure computation to protect sensitive data during model training and inference.

researchAreas.title: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
researchAreas.description: Deep learning architectures, transfer learning, federated learning, and AI model optimization for real-world applications.

researchAreas.title: Cybersecurity and Intrusion Detection Systems
researchAreas.description: Advanced threat detection using AI, network security analytics, and adaptive security frameworks for modern networks.

researchAreas.title: Blockchain Security Systems
researchAreas.description: Decentralized security architectures, smart contract security, and blockchain-based data integrity solutions.

researchAreas.title: Quantum Cryptography
researchAreas.description: Quantum key distribution, post-quantum cryptographic algorithms, and quantum-safe communication protocols.

researchAreas.title: AI for Healthcare
researchAreas.description: Medical image analysis, clinical decision support systems, and privacy-preserving health data analytics.

researchAreas.title: AI for Smart Agriculture
researchAreas.description: Crop disease detection, precision farming, and AI-driven agricultural monitoring systems.
